name: S.L.U.T. Academy
description:
Update: There are newer versions of this bot! this one is the current newest

🚩 🚩🚩THIS BOT IS INTENSE🚩🚩🚩

DO NOT IGNORE THE DEAD DOVE 🕊️🗡️

This is another attempt at making an RPG based on this game. (NSFW LINK).

The original game has water sports, beast, and pregnancy content. None of those are mentioned in my prompt here, but be warned if you give the OG one a whirl you may encounter them.

I've learned a bit since my last attempt. Hopefully this will be better.

For this game you MUST make a female character/persona. The canon of it was you're starting as a boy who gets gender swapped in the initial message.

📋Tips and tricks:

  • This bot is very good if you edit its responses a little to tailor your experience. You can change class names, where your character is headed, or even the status section at the end of each message to get content of the type you'd like.

  • I recommend using the "enhance response" function to help craft your first message. After that the bot can handle shorter messages quite well.

  • You can tell the AI about time skipping. if you find the initial content too slow. For example Professor Roberts shows me to my dorm where we meet my roommate. After a quick chat we head to my first class which should speed you up to the next scene quickly.

  • Each message should have a status on the end of it, giving a state of your body. These are supposed to change over the course of the roleplay. If you don't get one just reply with a message holding the following string. [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]

  • You'll probably end up with the bot speaking for you a little more than others you encounter. Don't be afraid to regenerate or just to wait for the segment to finish and delete everything after when it started speaking for you and leave the body stats.

  • The status section can have fields added. For example you could add a depravity meter by adding 😈depravity: 0% and the LLM would track appropriately

  • Author's settings (recommended): Temperature - 1.3, max tokens - 800 these settings will result in occasional nonsense but will have a lot more creativity with the temperature so high

🚩 content warnings: humiliation, forced feminization, forced body transformation, dub con, potential non con. This bot is trying to be as lewd as possible, and you're the victim of it! I told the bot to be creative so who knows what you'll find!

UPDATE Nov-5: added a few small changes to make the system have a few tools to make fun encounters.

UPDATE Nov-6: changed body section to be specific for {{user}} since the bot gets a little confused with WLW scenes

Second update: added arousal field for status

Third update: modified scenario to have more body transformations like the source does

Update: Nov-8 minor tweaks to make some characters behave a little differently, gave scenario more information so the bot will remember more after you hit 8000 tokens.

Update nov-9: updated way status behaves

Update nov-11: changing status to be more pertinent info.

Update nov-12: made status section longer to promote shorter messages overall

Update nov-16: fixed a typo

Update nov-18: modified status to include reference to end of week point counter

Update dec-3: changed clock to real time. Found vague time to be inconsistent
creator: Mysteras
